---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Istar Pack
title: "[FEATURE] <short summary>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is currently painful or
impossible with Istar Pack?

## Current Workaround

How do you work around this limitation today (or fail to)?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like Istar Pack to do. Be as specific as possible.
If you have an idea for the UI flow, describe it step by step.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you have thought about, and why you
prefer your proposed solution.

## Scope

- Does this require changes to the install flow? (yes / no)
- Does this require changes to the profile content? (yes / no)
- Does this require a new theme? (yes / no)
- Does this require a new command-line switch? (yes / no)

## Compatibility

- Must work on PowerShell 5.1? (yes / no)
- Must work on PowerShell 7+? (yes / no)

If your feature requires PS 7-only behavior, describe how PS 5.1 users
should be handled (graceful degradation, error message, hidden option).

## Additional Context

Any mockups, screenshots, or references to other tools that have a
similar feature.
